data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations related to this requirement. The linked use case specifies the need for tracking conversion to the campaign, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this tracking is implemented or validated. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to confirm satisfaction of the requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
